ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company or security */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector of the security */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) number */,
  "figi" TEXT /* Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the security information was last updated */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the security */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the security (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical sector classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, compliance officer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being traded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per unit of the security */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the security */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the security traded during the day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount for the day */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for the day */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)
